cards.uprightOriginalGuidebookText: Under the starlit sky, the seeker pours life back into the earth and remembers their source.
cards.reversedOriginalGuidebookText: When the waters still, faith feels distant; yet the stars remain, waiting for your return.
cards.notes: Use with recovery-oriented readings and post-conflict clarity themes.

cards.uprightOriginalGuidebookText: The moon path is misted—walk slowly, and let instinct speak before certainty arrives.
cards.reversedOriginalGuidebookText: As shadows thin, the hidden path appears and anxious echoes lose their voice.
cards.notes: Strong in readings about ambiguity, dreams, and emotional processing.
